pageContext.name: Sora Ver. 2
pageContext.description: Sora, the main protagonist of KINGDOM HEARTS III, makes an appearance in the PLAY ARTS KAI line with a completely new 'Ver.2 sculpt!  In addition to the brushed-up modeling, he features the metallic crown motif necklace, which is eye-catching. The face parts are vividly colored and have detailed expressions. Includes additional hand parts and Sora's iconic Kingdom Key Keyblade, making it possible to replicate iconic poses.
